description.ko: 생물학적 생명과 디지털 데이터가 공존하는 미래의 몰입형 비전입니다. FLORA-9은 빛과 정보로 맥동하는 식물들을 통해 자연이 사이버네틱 풍경으로 진화한 모습을 보여줍니다.
description.en: An immersive vision of a future where biological life and digital data coexist. FLORA-9 represents the evolution of nature into a cybernetic landscape, featuring plants that pulse with light and information.

prompt: A futuristic botanical garden where organic flora merges with advanced technology. Transparent neon flowers with glowing fiber-optic veins, metallic vines wrapping around holographic trees, digital binary code particles floating like pollen, bioluminescent moss on circuit-patterned ground, soft cinematic lighting, 8k resolution, hyper-realistic, cybernetic ecosystem.
